json-logger:logger.doc:name: INFO: File received from SFTP for processing
json-logger:logger.message: Sales Order File received from SFTP for processing

json-logger:logger.doc:name: DEBUG: Incoming Payload
INFO: Sales Order file processed from SFTP
json-logger:logger.message: Sales Order file processed from SFTP

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { object: Mule::p('sfdc.salesOrder.object'), externalId: Mule::p('sfdc.salesOrder.externalId') }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { apiName: Mule::p('api.name'), apiVersion: Mule::p('api.version'), traceId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as DateTime, message: "Success", sfResponse: write(payload,"application/json") } as Object {encoding: "UTF-8", mediaType: "application/json"}

json-logger:logger.doc:name: INFO: Sales Order file processed successfully
ERROR: Upsert in salesforce failed. Moving file to failed folder
json-logger:logger.message: Upsert in salesforce failed. Moving file to failed folder

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json fun parseISOTimeToNumber(isoTime: String): String = do { // Extract hours, minutes, seconds from "HH:mm:ss.SSSZ" format var hour = isoTime[0 to 1] var minute = isoTime[3 to 4] var second = isoTime[6 to 7] --- (hour ++ minute ++ second) as String } --- payload.allFailedJobs map ((item, index) -> { HHHCMPN: item.originalFields.Company_Number__c default "", HHHDIVN: item.originalFields.Division_Number__c default "", HHHDPTN: item.originalFields.Department_Number__c default "", HHHCUSN: item.originalFields.Account__c default "", HHHORNR: item.originalFields.Order_Number__c default "", HHHORTY: item.originalFields.Order_Type__c default "", HHHMEMO: item.originalFields.Memo_Billing_Code__c default "", HHHMEM2: item.originalFields.Memo_Billing_Code_2__c default "", HHHWHSN: item.originalFields.Warehouse_Number__c default "", HHHSETN: item.originalFields.Remote_Set_Number__c default "", HHHARCD: item.originalFields.Active_Record_Code__c default "", HHHSLNB: item.originalFields.Salesrep__c default "", HHHDTES: (item.originalFields.Ship_Date__c default "") as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"} replace "-" with "", HHHDTET: (item.originalFields.Order_Date__c default "") as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"} replace "-" with "", HHHINSI: item.originalFields.Special_Instructions__c default "", HHHINS2: item.originalFields.Special_Instructions_2__c default "", HHHINVR: item.originalFields.Invoice_Reference_Number__c default "", HHHTRMC: item.originalFields.Terms_Code__c default "", HHHUSER: item.originalFields.User_id__c default "", HHHUSR1: item.originalFields.User_id_1__c default "", HHHUSR2: item.originalFields.User_id_2__c default "", HHHTIMO: parseISOTimeToNumber(item.originalFields.Time_of_order__c) default "", HHHTIME: parseISOTimeToNumber(item.originalFields.Time__c) default "", HHHFSYR: item.originalFields.Fiscal_year__c default "", HHHFSPD: item.originalFields.Fiscal_Period__c default "", HHHWEKC: item.originalFields.Current_week_of_year__c default "", HHHCLYR: item.originalFields.Calendar_Year__c default "", HHHCLWK: item.originalFields.Calendar_week__c default "", HHHINVN: item.originalFields.Invoice_number__c default "", HHHDTEI: (item.originalFields.Date_of_last_order__c default "") as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"} replace "-" with "", HHHINAM: item.originalFields.Invoice_Amount__c default "", HHHQYOA: item.originalFields.Quantity_Ordered__c default "", HHHQYSA: item.originalFields.Quantity_Shipped__c default "", HHHEXCB: item.originalFields.Ext_case_cube__c default "", HHHEXSH: item.originalFields.Ext_ship_weight__c default "", HHHEXSG: item.originalFields.Ext_sales_gross__c default "", HHHEXSN: item.originalFields.Ext_sales_net__c default "", HHHEXCG: item.originalFields.Ext_salesrep_cost_gross__c default "", HHHEXCR: item.originalFields.Ext_salesrep_cost_net__c default "", HHHEXAC: item.originalFields.Ext_actual_cost__c default "", HHHEXBS: item.originalFields.Ext_bid_sales_amount__c default "", HHHEXMC: item.originalFields.O_E_ext_mkt_cost__c default "", HHHEXRC: item.originalFields.O_E_ext_slsrep_cost__c default "", HHHCSCD: item.originalFields.Chain_store_code__c default "", errorMessage: item.errorMessage default "" })

json-logger:logger.doc:name: INFO: Sales Order Master file processed failed
json-logger:logger.message: Sales Order Master file processed failed

json-logger:logger.doc:name: DEBUG: Sales Order Header to Exit
json-logger:logger.message: Sales Order Header Sub Flow Completed
